popularStory.headline: Edmund Mortimer Life Story
popularStory.description:
Birth:  1351, England 
Death:  Dec. 27, 1381
Cork
County Cork, Ireland 

Edmund Mortimer, 3rd Earl of March and Earl of Ulster was son of Roger Mortimer,by his wife Philippa, daughter of 
Willia …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March於1352年2月1日出生在威爾士布雷康史爾利斯文時，他的父親Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March23歲，母親Philippa Montagu19歲。他於1368年5月1日與Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster在英國波克夏雷亞丁結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1381年12月27日在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克享年29歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March于1352年2月1日出生在威尔士布雷康史爾利斯文时，他的父亲Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March23岁，母亲Philippa Montagu19岁。他于1368年5月1日与Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster在英国波克夏雷亞丁结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1381年12月27日在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克享年29岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾維格莫。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March was born on 1 February 1352, in Llyswen, Breconshire, Wales, his father, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, was 23 and his mother, Philippa Montagu, was 19. He married Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster on 1 May 1368, in Reading, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 27 December 1381, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 29, and was buried in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March est né le 1 février 1352, à Llyswen, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Philippa Montagu, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster le 1 mai 1368, à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 27 décembre 1381, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March am 1. Februar 1352 in Llyswen, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March 23 und seine Mutter Philippa Montagu 19. Er hat am 1. Mai 1368 in Reading, Berkshire, England Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Dezember 1381 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Cork, County Cork, Irland und wurde in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March è nato il il 1 febbraio 1352 nel Llyswen, Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Montagu, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster il 1 maggio 1368, nel Reading, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 dicembre 1381, nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of Marchが1352年2月1日にウェールズブレコンシュアイアリスウンで生まれた時，父Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of Marchは23歳，母Philippa Montaguは19歳であった。1368年5月1日にイギリスバークシュアイアレアディングでPhilippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1381年12月27日にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクで29歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March(이)가 1352년 2월 1일 웨일스 브레콘실르 리스웬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Montagu(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1368년 5월 1일 영국 버크실르 리딩에서 Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1381년 12월 27일 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에 묻혔다.

mn.1 February 1352–27 December 1381: 1352 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 1–1381 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 27

pt.1 February 1352–27 December 1381: 1 de fevereiro de 1352–27 de dezembro de 1381
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March nasceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1352, em Llyswen, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Montagu, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster em 1 de maio de 1368, em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1381, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March родился 1 февраля 1352 г. в местности ллисвен, брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Montagu, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster 1 мая 1368 г. в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 27 декабря 1381 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.1 February 1352–27 December 1381: 1 de febrero de 1352–27 de diciembre de 1381
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March nació el 1 de febrero de 1352, en Llyswen, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Philippa Montagu, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster el 1 de mayo de 1368, en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1381, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
